message:
fix(connector-registry): resolve borrow checker conflict in digest verification path

Fix a borrow-after-move issue in ConnectorRegistryClient where
self.packages[package_id].manifest was borrowed after self was
mutably borrowed through record_verification(). Clone the manifest
before the verify_digest call so the immutable reference doesn't
conflict with the mutable self borrow.

Also add connector_registry module declaration to lib.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
